title: Red Valentine Heart-Shaped Balloons - 30.48cm, Pack of 12 - Balloons for Love and Valentine Celebration
features: PERFECT FOR VALENTINE'S DAY: Our red valentine heart-shaped balloons will set the mood for love, making your romantic event unforgettable! Surprise your loved one or decorate any special occasion with these beautiful red heart balloons.

EYE-CATCHING HEART SHAPE: Bring a touch of love to your celebration with these unique and vibrant heart-shaped balloons, offering a lovely and warm atmosphere, perfect for a proposal, anniversary, or valentine's celebration.

GENEROUS SIZE: Measuring 30.48cm (12 inches) when inflated, these heart-shaped red balloons are large enough to make a statement, adding an irresistible charm to your love-filled event and photo sessions.
VALUE PACK: You'll receive a pack of 12 high-quality, beautiful heart-shaped balloons in bold red, giving you plenty of balloons to decorate your space or gift to your significant other.

EASY TO INFLATE & LONG-LASTING: These durable balloons are designed for easy inflation and long-lasting use, so you can fill them with air or helium, and enjoy the romantic ambiance throughout your celebration.
description: Our red Valentine heart-shaped balloons (30.48cm, Pack of 12) are the perfect way to add a touch of romance to your Valentine's Day celebration. Designed with precision and care, each balloon inflates to a beautiful heart shape, symbolizing love and affection. The vibrant red color adds a festive touch, capturing the essence of passion and romance. These balloons are made from high-quality latex, ensuring durability and longevity. Ideal for decorating a romantic dinner, surprising your loved ones, or even for a festive Valentine's party setting. This pack of 12 allows you to spread love generously, creating memorable moments.
